last_comments: Implemented the canonical flag-only `ship dev` contract by removing the `shipdev` alias and rejecting positional mode args (`ship dev worker|all|web`). Synced help output and CLI docs, and removed the stale known-gap note that said legacy dev paths were still accepted. Verification: `go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/cli ./tools/cli/ship/internal/commands`; `docket validate TKT-256`; `docket validate TKT-194`.
